nasb.text: For when I bring them into the land flowing with milk and honey, which I swore to their fathers, and they have eaten and are satisfied and become prosperous, then they will turn to other gods and serve them, and spurn Me and break My covenant.

esv.text: For when I have brought them into the land flowing with milk and honey, which I swore to give to their fathers, and they have eaten and are full and grown fat, they will turn to other gods and serve them, and despise me and break my covenant.

cnv.text: 因為我把他們領進了我向他們的列祖起誓應許的地，就是流奶與蜜的地，他們在那裡吃飽了，發胖了，就必偏向別的神，事奉他們，藐視我，破壞我的約。

ccb.text: 因为当我把他们带到我起誓应许他们祖先的奶蜜之乡后，当他们在那里吃饱喝足后，就会嫌弃我，违背我与他们所立的约，去供奉别的神明。
